title: CloudDash pricing plans comparison
content: CloudDash offers three main plans. Starter ($49/mo) includes basic monitoring for up to 50 cloud resources, 7-day data retention, and email support. Pro ($199/mo) includes up to 500 resources, 30-day retention, multi-cloud cost optimization, and priority support. Enterprise (Custom pricing starting at $999/mo) includes unlimited resources, 1-year data retention, SSO/SAML integrations, dedicated account manager, and custom RBAC roles. Overages on Starter and Pro are billed at $1 per additional resource. This section provides additional context to ensure comprehensive documentation. The CloudDash platform is built with robustness and scalability in mind. When encountering issues, always verify your configuration settings and ensure that your network allows communication with our endpoints. If you continue to experience difficulties, please consult the troubleshooting steps outlined previously. Our support team is available to assist you with any advanced configurations or unexpected behavior. Remember to keep your agent versions up to date to benefit from the latest features and security patches. Furthermore, monitoring your usage limits can prevent unexpected service interruptions. For detailed API specifications, refer to our developer portal. We are committed to providing reliable service and continuous improvements to our platform. Should you have any feedback or feature requests, do not hesitate to reach out. Thank you for choosing CloudDash as your monitoring solution. We hope this guide has been helpful in resolving your query.
